subtitle: Prayer is one of the greatest gifts we can give each other. Let's join together in praying for our camp, one another, and what God will do throughout the weekend.

prompts.title: Pray for Open Hearts
prompts.prompt: Pray that every camper would come ready to hear God clearly, with open hearts and fewer distractions.

prompts.title: Pray for Safe Travel
prompts.prompt: Pray for safe travel to and from camp, alert drivers, and smooth journeys for every family.

prompts.title: Pray for the Speakers
prompts.prompt: Pray for Dn. Stephan Sabu and Biju Ninan as they share God's Word, that they would speak with clarity, courage, and grace.

prompts.title: Pray for the Worship Team
prompts.prompt: Pray that worship would be sincere, joyful, and centred on Jesus, drawing hearts toward Him.

prompts.title: Pray for the Leaders
prompts.prompt: Pray for every leader serving this weekend, that God would give them wisdom, patience, humility, and joy.

prompts.title: Pray for New Friendships
prompts.prompt: Pray that new friendships would form easily, no one would feel left out, and our camp would be full of genuine love.

prompts.title: Pray Beyond Camp
prompts.prompt: Pray that the theme Undivided would keep shaping our lives after camp, in the ordinary days that follow.
